input_type.description: HTML input type (text, date, time, datetime-local, number, email, password, tel)

zIndex.description: Layer order - higher values render on top of lower values

input_font_size.description: Font size of the input text in pixels

input_font_color.description: Text color inside the input field

input_font_family.description: CSS font-family for the input text

input_background_color.description: Background color of the input field

input_border_color.description: Border color of the input field

input_border_width.description: Border width of the input field in pixels

input_border_radius.description: Corner radius of the input field in pixels

input_padding.description: CSS padding shorthand for the input field interior

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown inside the input field when empty
